chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Revision Application No.90 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 24.11.2025 Mr.Abdul Malik Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.4 ****** The applicant last appeared before this Court on 01.12.2023, thereafter, none have been present for the applicants and no intimation has been received inspite of several dates of hearing including inter alia, 23.8.2024, 21.10.2025, 29.10.2025, 13.11.2025 and today 24.11.2025. Heard learned counsel for the respondent No.4. For reasons to be recorded, this Civil Revision Application is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
